title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 265.380 - Unwholesome or adulterated meat to be marked, how
text:
265.380.  Unwholesome or adulterated meat to be marked, how. — All meat found to be unwholesome or adulterated shall be marked with the official condemned mark.  The mark shall state that the article was inspected and condemned.
(L. 1967 p. 371 § 8)
